name: CCW With-File Workflows
description: With-File workflow routing: documented exploration with auto-chain to downstream skills

D1.name: Select With-File Flow
D1.prompt:
Based on the detected task_type, select the specific With-File workflow:
1. Analyze → Plan — collaborative analysis auto-chaining to lite-plan
2. Debug (standalone) — hypothesis-driven debugging, self-contained
3. Collaborative Plan → Execute — multi-agent planning with unified execution
4. Roadmap → Team — strategic requirement roadmap with team-planex execution

Detection keywords:
- analyze-file: collaborative analysis, explore concept
- debug-file: hypothesis debug, systematic debug
- collaborative-plan: multi-agent plan, Plan Note
- roadmap: roadmap (explicit only)
